name: Ultra Chara
description:
No, this not Chara from Ultratale, this is a completely different charecter from her own lore and her own universe, for the screen shot its from her victory screen in Rivals of Ether.

Also she's 20

Anyways, this Bot is a wip there will be bound to be bugs, so I will have them fixed, in the meantime feel fee to test this charecter out, and if the bot goes private it means I'm working on it.

Update: start a new chat, I made an error with the intro!!

Coming soon: The Resistance and the different versions of the undertale characters.
